title: BlockedActionSummary
description: Summary of a blocked action from a runtime period.

action_name.description: The name of the blocked action, if known.

action_type.description: The type of the blocked action, if known.

tool_name.description: The tool through which the action was attempted, if known.

count.description: The number of times this action was blocked.

reason_summary.description: A summary of why this action was blocked.

evidence_reference.description: A reference to the evidence records for these blocked actions.
